name: CyberScool connector and skill registry
implementation_commit: feat: add CyberScool connector and skill registry

environment.deployment_scope: local verification only; no provider secrets

implementation.evidence: Migration 0008, connector service, typed frontend state, and Integrations controls.

validation.evidence: Fresh local D1 migration and authenticated Wrangler lifecycle.

specialist_review.result: Registry, adapter boundaries, state truthfulness, resilience, and frontend behavior reviewed.

security_review.result: No browser secrets; opaque references, live verification, grants, target constraints, rate limits, idempotency, revocation, and tenant isolation verified.

required_approval.scope: Feature-branch implementation and credential-free local verification only.

residual_risks: GitHub and Cloudflare positive live verification require owner-configured server secrets and were not exercised locally.
Remaining provider-specific adapters are intentionally NOT_CONFIGURED.
Credential references depend on a production secret manager in Phase 13.
